tex:
(a) Ahmed increases $40$ by $300\%$.
\newline
\\
From this list, put a ring around the correct calculation.
\newline
\\
$40 \times 1.300$\\
$40 \times 3$\\
$40 \times 400$\\
$40 \times 4$\\
$40 \times 300$

(b) Ahmed finds the magnitude of the vector $\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ -3 \end{pmatrix}$.
\newline
\\
From this list, put a ring around the correct calculation.
\newline
\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} + (-3)^{2}}$\\
$2^{2} - 3^{2}$\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} - 3^{2}}$\\
$2^{2} + (-3)^{2}$\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} + (-3)^{2}}$

content.content:
Ahmed increases $40$ by $300\%$.

\\

\\

Ahmed finds the magnitude of the vector $\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ -3 \end{pmatrix}$.
\newline
\\

\\

_rawBody:
\begin{parts}
\item Ahmed increases $40$ by $300\%$.\\
From this list, put a ring around the correct calculation.\\
$40 \times 1.300$\\
$40 \times 3$\\
$40 \times 400$\\
$40 \times 4$\\
$40 \times 300$

\AnswerLine[][]
\Marks{1}

\item Ahmed finds the magnitude of the vector $\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ -3 \end{pmatrix}$.\\
From this list, put a ring around the correct calculation.\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} + (-3)^{2}}$\\
$2^{2} - 3^{2}$\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} - 3^{2}}$\\
$2^{2} + (-3)^{2}$\\
$\sqrt{2^{2} + (-3)^{2}}$

\AnswerLine[][]
\Marks{1}

\end{parts}
